About

As Unique
As Herself

Born in Cape Verde, raised by the world. Glaucia Monteiro is a multilingual model, writer, actor, and creative force who has lived across 26 countries — fluent in Portuguese, English, French, and Spanish, with Korean in progress.

Her work lives at the intersection of high fashion and raw humanity. Whether in a studio, on a runway, or on a Seoul back street, she brings an undeniable presence shaped by deep cultural roots and an entirely uncompromising self.

Available for editorial, commercial, runway, film, voice work, and brand partnerships across international markets.
